goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'birmingham new street' and should 'leave after 11:30'.
The train should leave on 'saturday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'travel time', 'arrival time', and 'train ID'.
You are also looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'the fitzwilliam museum'.
Make sure you get 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
